5 September 2025
U
17:57
URUTURA MAN
I would like to support your vision and for that I have some friendly advice
17:57
I have been part of this space and this channel too (followed you first on X then on here) for a long time
17:58
Your roadmap for this token looks good and it seems you really will deliver on your promises
17:59
But specifically your work here, to be honest and not undermining your work or expertise in anyway, in terms of onchain investigation and rug-flagging is sub par
17:59
again not trying to be disrespectful, as I said I respect your actions
18:00
But maybe diving deeper onchain, either by training yourself or inviting some experts to join your team to really deliver amazing value to your future app users and to boost the value proposition of what you've created in general, would go a long way
18:01
I don't see anyone doing this in the memecoin space exclusively. There are a lot of onchain investigators and good ones but not many are memecoin-focused/exclusive
18:02
The scams you currently highlight are obvious and getting to a level where you could flag all scams (the obvious malicious ones atleast, which includes a lot of the memecoins launched daily) would establish you as a leader in this domain on memecoin analysis
18:02
just my 2 cents
18:03
If you want some insights from me (not an expert but I've delved into the raw onchain data for memecoins a lot) you're welcome to DM me and pick my brain for whatever questions you like, I'll try to provide all information I know to the best of my ability
18:03
Cheers
18:06
To put it concisely - flagging scams based on support from known rugging KOLs or based on the most obvious scam patterns is easy and doesn't take a lot of skill to flag. But diving onchain and analyzing the raw data with domain-leading analysis techniques, that would not only provide tremendous value and set cryptorugmunch apart, but help the whole community and solana as an ecosystem as a whole tremendously
👍
p

Water the seeds he plants 🪴 $CRM 🚿

00:58
Crypto Rug Muncher
Quick website update:

Our first designer way overpromised and way underdelivered, so I've brought on a grizzled veteran who’s shipped dozens of web3 sites.

We’ll build the site in phases.

• I’m getting a rough draft of his vision today. If approved, the final design should land within a couple of days.
• After design, the same designer will handle development and coding of our site to bring it to life.
• We’re on a professional, realistic timeline—targeting a polished, fully functional, best-in-class site in about 7-10 business days.

I won’t rush quality. Thanks for your patience while we build it right.

In the meantime, I’ll ramp up activity on my socials: regular project updates plus my usual scam/scammer analysis to keep eyes on us. We’ve grown without a site so far, and we’ll keep building until we have one worthy of this project. Keep the faith.

$CRM $cryptorugmunch

01:21
Crypto Rug Muncher
DM and chat expectations:

I’m doing my best to stay responsive, but if I answered every DM and kept up casual chats all day, I wouldn’t ship anything. Before messaging, please ask whether it truly adds value to the project.

Useful DMs:

• Whales requesting whale-chat access
• Genuine ideas or concerns about the project
• Credible tips on scams

Less useful and likely to be ignored:

• Casual chats, solicitations/ads, spam, requests to join other projects, or questions already answered in announcements/AMAs.

I appreciate everyone’s energy—just be mindful that focus time helps me ship faster for all of us. Thanks for understanding.

$CRM $cryptorugmunch

02:03
Crypto Rug Muncher
Solflare Wallet notice re: $CRM

• Some Solflare users have reported issues with $CRM.

Two likely causes:

1. Verification: We’re showing as “unverified” in Solflare because we haven’t completed Jupiter verification yet. I’m working on it and hope to fast track our verification submission today.

2. Liquidity routing: Solflare appears to be routing trades to the Raydium pool, while most of our liquidity is on a Meteora pool. This can cause failed or suboptimal swaps.

Temporary workaround:

• Use Phantom to buy/sell $CRM for now. Phantom should route to the correct Meteora liquidity, avoiding issues.
👍 8

Crypto Rug Muncher
⚠️ Heads up on $TAELS. Looks like a recycled/bundled scam: launched last year, rugged, and now it popped out of nowhere. Recent volume appears heavily botted to lure entries.

GMGN flags hundreds of fresh wallets and dozens of insiders to the token. High risk this rugs again. Do your own research and stay safe.

CA: CGM8mUKRRVX4sQYtp7jg9C3rHoNesiUf6heGoWxapump

$TAELS on Dexscreener:

https://dexscreener.com/solana/ccbaps8deafmxdqklmry6izvafcwzc8brwwfv4q6biq5

$TAELS on GMGN:

https://gmgn.ai/sol/token/rugmunch_CGM8mUKRRVX4sQYtp7jg9C3rHoNesiUf6heGoWxapump

05:10
Crypto Rug Muncher
Want to see more scammers get banned on X? Buy and hold $CRM / $cryptorugmunch and support what we are building.

Included in our app are plans to build a feature that tracks KOLs across projects and showcases what they’ve rugged before. You’ll see patterns, spot repeat offenders, and we’ll prompt users to report them to X for their flogging.

Our thesis: combine social metrics with on-chain data to flag scams earlier and help remove bad actors from our ecosystem. Social tells matter more than most think.

Tune in to our AMA on Tuesday at 5 PM CST—I'll dig into why social metrics matter so much and how to use them to your advantage.
❤ 13 🔥 5 👍 1

10:06
Crypto Rug Muncher
I’m genuinely grateful for how strong our community has been in supporting the chart. I’d obviously love to see more volume, but believe it will come as trust builds organically.

For transparency: aside from the $CRM I’ve gifted in contests and about $100 worth I gave a friend to get them into crypto and follow the project, I haven’t sold any of my tokens. This is all the $CRM I own, and I don’t plan to sell—I’ll keep adding when I can.

I’ve been buying dips too: added to the cryptorugmunch.sol wallet using trading-fee revenue I earned, and purchased an additional 5 SOL worth with DAO funds to get rugmunchdao.sol funded with some $CRM.

I’m not here to game the token; I want growth to stay organic and fair for all. Strong hands, strong community. I’m working to lead by example.

Crypto Rug Muncher
🚨 Meme Contest! 🚨

💰 Prize: $100 worth of $CRM
🎯 Task: Create a funny meme and post it as a reply to this tweet. It doesn’t have to use the same style or pose as the ad — let your imagination run wild and make it your own!
🏆 Winner: The meme with the most likes, retweets, and comments in the next 72 hours!

⚖️ Rules:
1. AI-generated graphics are allowed ✅ — feel free to get creative.
2. Engagement must be real — botted likes/retweets/comments = disqualified.
3. @cryptorugmunch will announce the winner at contest close, and all decisions will be final.
4. To allow as many community members to win as possible: if you’ve won a previous contest, you may still enter — but you cannot win this round.

🔥 Get creative. Go wild. Make us laugh. Good luck!

🎙 Podcast Guest Availability

I’m looking to make appearances on crypto-related podcasts over the next few weeks to:

• share insights about my project
• have a wide-ranging conversation about scams/scammers in the crypto space

A few notes:

✅ Open to podcasts of any size (as long as production quality is solid)
❌ I won't be paying for appearances
🚫 Won’t consider shows that have a track record of shilling scams

If you run a podcast and this sounds interesting, DM me on X or Telegram @cryptorugmunch.

Top-20 $CRM distribution looks solid. My goal is the eventual gradual redistribution toward a max of ~1–1.5% per wallet. For now, given the market cap, the balance looks good, assuming major holders support the direction we’re headed as a project. Top-20 $CRM distribution looks solid. My goal is the eventual gradual redistribution toward a max of ~1–1.5% per wallet. Crypto Rug Muncher
If your project melts down at a hint of FUD and your Telegram mods start banning community members for basic criticisms, your project probably sucks and has no legs anyway. $CRM Chat
In reply to this message
Target: web app access for holders by mid–Q4. Meanwhile, I’ll be increasing scam-coverage content to draw more eyes to my account and plan to turn our weekly AMA into a 2–3x/week live show across X, YouTube, Twitch, and Kick. I’ll also be guesting on other creators’ podcasts to amplify $CRM and $cryptorugmunch. I need people to know about the project so that I can build it. Keeping eyes on it will be a very important goal of mine.

Deleted Account
In reply to this message
Helll yeah 👍 good news 📰

Here’s why it’s important for a crypto project to be verified on Jupiter (with the star tag):
1. Trust & Credibility – Verification shows the project is real and transparent. It reduces fears of scams or rug pulls.
2. More Users & Liquidity – Traders and investors are more confident to put money in verified projects, which increases trading activity.
3. Community Growth – A verified tag makes it easier to attract new users and grow the project’s ecosystem.
4. Security Standards – Jupiter only verifies projects that meet certain standards, so it signals stronger safety.
5. Better Visibility – Verified projects get more attention on Jupiter, which boosts exposure.
❤

C
11:00
Crypto Rug Muncher
Two-week transparency check-in for $CRM and $cryptorugmunch

Big thank you to everyone who has traded $CRM over the last two weeks. Your trading has helped me and @RugMunchDao to raise just under $24,000. As I have promised, I didn’t pocket it all and I’ve already put nearly $2,000 back into $CRM from trading fees on my end. I’m also keeping a personal war chest ready to support the project if the DAO ever needs a boost. I plan to keep buying into the project as I’m able to afford it—slow, steady, and consistent.

Here’s where the DAO's money’s gone so far:

• Dexscreener logos/banners/socials for $CRM and $cryptorugmunch: $1,000
• Dextools logos/banners/socials for $CRM and $cryptorugmunch: $1,000
• Two 100k‑view ad campaigns on Dexscreener: $2,000
• One 100x Trending boost on Dexscreener: $899
• $CRM buy to fund the RugMunchDao.sol wallet: $1,000
• Wyoming LLC registration (est.): $1,000
• Project website (est.): $3,000–$4,000
• 1‑year business address in Wyoming: $300
• 1‑year X Pro for @RugMunchDao: $84
• 1‑year web hosting: $89.40
• Poe subscription (images/content): $99
• Community giveaways so far: $200
• $JUP burn for express listing: $500

Running total

Concrete costs so far (not counting the website range): $8,171.40

With website (low end): $11,171.40
With website (high end): $12,171.40

Why am I sharing all this? Because building isn’t magic—it takes time and real money. I can’t magically whip up a crypto security analysis app overnight, but we’re doing it the right way: earning visibility, laying solid infrastructure, taking compliance seriously from day one, and growing the community. I’ll keep showing up with honest updates as we spend and ship. Thanks again.
🔥 22 ❤ 13 🙏 4 👍 3 🥰 1

Crypto Rug Muncher
Reminder: Tomorrow at 5:00 PM CST we’re hosting our 3rd AMA.

What’s on the agenda:

• Project update: recent achievements and what’s next
• Roadmap: current work and upcoming milestones
• Deep dive: using social analytics (and key social metrics) to evaluate crypto projects and gain an edge on the market

I usually teach this material on social analytics in a course priced at 1 SOL, but I’ll be sharing it with the community for free during the AMA. Tune in to learn about our progress, pick up practical trading tips, and ask your questions.

See you tomorrow!

$CRM $cryptorugmunch

01:29
Crypto Rug Muncher
Community Update: 2 Weeks of Progress

Two weeks have passed since the project went live, and I thought it’d be a great time to share an update with the community on what’s been accomplished and what’s still in progress. Thank you for riding with us—your support keeps us building. Here’s where we stand:

✅ Dexscreener socials and logos updated for $CRM + $cryptorugmunch
✅ Dextools socials and logos updated for $CRM + $cryptorugmunch
✅ Ran multiple 100k-view ad campaigns on Dexscreener at launch
✅ Announced plan to allocate 50% of trading fees to build next‑gen analysis tools for crypto degens
✅ Shared the vision for our security tool suite and outlined some planned features with community
⏳ Registered the project as Rug Munch Media LLC in Wyoming — pending state approval
✅ Hired a professional web designer; initial layout approved
✅ Listed as verified on Jupiter Exchange
✅ Provided a development timeline and app release plan to the community
⏳ Applied to list $CRM and $cryptorugmunch on CoinGecko and CMC — initial submission had our site before it was ready; a temporary placeholder is live now. I’ll push to get this resolved this week.

Thank you for being part of this journey and for your continued support. More to come—let’s keep building! 🚀

$CRM $cryptorugmunch
